ingredients_text: White Chocolate 72% (Sugar, Cocoa Butter Whole _Milk_ Powder, Emulsifier: _Soya_ Lecithin, Natural Vanilla Flavouring), Filling 17% (Vegetable Fat (Palm, Sunflower, Rapeseed) in varying proportions, Sugar, Skimmed _Milk_ Powder, Lactose (_Milk_ Sugar), Emulsifier: _Soya_ Lecithin, Natural Flavourings), Popping Candy 11% (Sugar, Lactose (_Milk_ Sugar), Glucose Syrup, Propellant: Carbon Dioxide, Flavouring)
